# Ben Zachara — DevOps Engineer

> Personal portfolio and resume site for Ben Zachara, a DevOps engineer specializing in Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, and cloud-native architecture.

## About

Ben Zachara is a DevOps engineer building reliable infrastructure with Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI/CD pipelines. He automates everything.

## Pages

- [Home](https://zachara.dev/): Landing page with introduction and tech stack
- [Resume](https://zachara.dev/resume): Full resume with skills, experience, and education
- [Projects](https://zachara.dev/projects): Hands-on DevOps project portfolio
- [Contact](https://zachara.dev/contact): Email and GitHub links
- [Full LLM Context](https://zachara.dev/llms-full.txt): Extended context with complete resume and project details

## Skills

- Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker, K3s, Helm, containerd
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Oracle Cloud, CloudFlare
- Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
- Scripting & Languages: Bash, Python, TypeScript, Go, YAML
